name: Fanky
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, sugar, and salt into a bowl.
2. Work butter into the dry ingredients until crumbly.
3. Add egg yolks, then sour cream and wine. Mix well to form a soft dough.
4. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead until smooth (about 5 minutes).
5. Divide dough into 2 or 3 pieces.
6. Roll each piece very thin on a lightly floured surface.
7. Cut into about 5-inch diamond-shaped pieces.
8. Fry in hot oil (around 350°F/175°C) for one to two minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels.
10. Dust with powdered sugar before serving.
